commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: Paul greets him as a friend but as a friend in the Lord, because he had not shared Paul’s work or his imprisonment. Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: Think what an honor it was to be loved by the apostle Paul. If Ampliatus had not been worthy of this, he would not have attracted Paul’s love.
